text: This place feels both sterile and surreal—a corridor, emptily lit, leading deeper into quiet. My footsteps echo, almost reminding me of my own existence in a world that seems paused between acts. I am peripherally aware of my isolation and the technological coldness, which makes the experience quietly uneasy. The quiet magnifies my thoughts. I’m caught considering the line between emptiness and anticipation, as if this moment is suspended, waiting for meaning to emerge from the shadows.
